source.uiux_baseline_docx: AI_Agent_Workflow工作台_UIUX详细设计规范与需求规格说明书_v1.1_新增Workflow编排.docx

guardrails: This map converts checklist items into evidence and gap tracks; it does not claim A4 acceptance.
No FR item is accepted until A4 UX acceptance review has recorded end-to-end user-path evidence.
Runtime bridge evidence means a reviewer has implementation and test artifacts to inspect; it is not phase-exit readiness.
Partial runtime bridge evidence means a bridge exists but one or more FR-required semantics remain missing.
Dependency-gated FR items stay blocked until the corresponding gate is explicitly approved and implemented.

W1.5.199 refreshes current evidence status after selected-node Task Drawer artifact detail implementation; it changes no accepted spec, ADR, schema, generated schema, dependency, packaging, updater, or baseline docx content.

missing_evidence: A4 has not recorded menu bar acceptance.
Cross-platform packaged launch evidence is still blocked by packaging dependency gates.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Capture shell/menu launch evidence after packaging gate implementation.

missing_evidence: All first-level module entries have not been accepted.
Dock collapse and restore have not been recorded as an A4 path.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Define the required first-level module list and capture Dock collapse UX evidence.

missing_evidence: Project-backed filesystem enumeration is not implemented.
Default-hidden Drawer interaction has not been accepted by A4.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Move File Tree from local scaffold to project-backed Drawer evidence.

missing_evidence: DEP-REACT-FLOW is not approved or installed.
Real React Flow Canvas branch, parallel, feedback-loop, drag, connect, edit, and persistence evidence is missing.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Wait for DEP-REACT-FLOW approval, then replace the read-only Canvas scaffold with React Flow evidence.

missing_evidence: Selection is still local scaffold behavior.
Right Task details have not been accepted as automatically bound to the selected node.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Capture node selection to Task Drawer binding evidence, then repeat after React Flow implementation.

missing_evidence: Inputs, outputs, review rules, Skill, model, and artifact fields are not fully accepted.
Runtime-backed detail updates are not implemented.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Bind Task Drawer detail fields to runtime state and capture full-field A4 evidence.

missing_evidence: Backend run-once execution success has not been proven end-to-end from the desktop workbench.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for execution mode placement and behavior is not recorded.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Prepare A4 execution-mode evidence and add backend run-once integration proof before FR-007 acceptance.

missing_evidence: A4 UX acceptance evidence for the runtime-backed current-node/global Workflow Chat instruction path is not recorded.
Project-backed command history and persistence remain outside this evidence refresh and must not be inferred from local receipt metadata.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Package FR-008 runtime-backed Chat instruction evidence for A4 review without marking the FR accepted.

missing_evidence: A4 has not accepted the first-viewport default collapsed layout.
Phase-level UX recording is missing.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Prepare A4 review capture for stream panel default collapsed behavior.

missing_evidence: A4 has not accepted the full expanded event taxonomy as an end-user path.
Real workflow stream demo evidence is missing.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Capture expanded stream panel review evidence against real or fixture-backed workflow events.

missing_evidence: Reference upload during project initialization remains outside the project creation bridge and needs a combined user-path proof.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for the full new-project path is not recorded.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Combine project creation and reference import into a reviewer-facing user path before FR-011 acceptance.

missing_evidence: A8 git-history audit evidence for automatic commit/tag behavior is not recorded.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for the mandatory Git path is not recorded.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Prepare mandatory-Git A4 evidence and A8 audit material before FR-012 acceptance.

missing_evidence: A4 UX acceptance evidence for reference import, enable, disable, and view user paths is not recorded.
Delete semantics remain intentionally out of scope until accepted spec material defines them.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Prepare A4 reference-management user-path evidence before FR-013 acceptance.

missing_evidence: Skill registry candidate discovery and MCP configuration UI remain incomplete.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for secret-safe Skill configuration display is not recorded.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Complete candidate/configuration evidence before FR-014 acceptance.

missing_evidence: Automatic snapshot creation, restore-to-snapshot, and continue execution are not implemented.
Git-backed restore semantics and A4 UX acceptance evidence remain unrecorded.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Implement automatic snapshot, restore, and continue evidence before FR-015 acceptance.

missing_evidence: A4 has not accepted final user-facing labels for every event class.
Phase-level demo stream evidence is missing.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Prepare StreamEvent classification labels and capture A4 review evidence.

missing_evidence: A4 UX acceptance evidence for node artifact detail display and safe open/download behavior is not recorded.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Package selected-node Task Drawer artifact detail and native open/download handoff for A4 review.

missing_evidence: Pending-decision discovery, full pause/resume user path, and high-risk-node review UX are not complete.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for semi-auto HITL remains unrecorded.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Add pending-decision discovery and pause/resume A4 evidence before FR-018 acceptance.

missing_evidence: DEP-REACT-FLOW is not approved or installed.
Pan, zoom, fit view, edit lock, and 100-node performance evidence are missing.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: After DEP-REACT-FLOW approval, add Canvas controls and 100-node performance evidence.

missing_evidence: A formal common-shortcut acceptance list is not recorded.
User-facing command discoverability is not implemented.
fr_evidence_items.next_action: Define shortcut command map and add discoverability evidence.

source_status_summary.phase_exit_claim: EXIT-P1-1 remains not_ready until all 20 FR items have A4 acceptance evidence.

next_recommended_slices.title: Desktop FR-011 project-reference runtime follow-up
next_recommended_slices.reason: Continue remaining runtime-flow implementation while the A4 runtime-flow decision handoff remains pending reviewer approval.
